item.title: Little v. Llano County Legalized Library Censorship. What Exactly Does This Mean?: Book Censorship News, February 13, 2026
item.description: What are the censorship implications of Little v. Llano County? Lead plaintiff Leila Green Little talks about the case.

item.title: New and Upcoming Mysteries and Thrillers To Try on Audio
item.description: Fans of twisty, gripping reads, take note. These new and forthcoming mysteries and thrillers should be on your to-listen list.
